scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node scripts/fix-capacitor-cordova-gradle.js
scripts.android:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-$HOME/Android/jdk21} ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && mkdir -p build/android && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk build/android/planrun-debug.apk
scripts.android:install: npm run android:debug && adb install -r build/android/planrun-debug.apk
scripts.android:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-$HOME/Android/jdk21} ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && mkdir -p build/android && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk build/android/planrun-release.apk
scripts.android:publish-debug: npm run android:debug && mkdir -p dist/downloads && cp build/android/planrun-debug.apk dist/downloads/planrun-debug.apk
scripts.android:publish-release: npm run android:release && mkdir -p dist/downloads && cp build/android/planrun-release.apk dist/downloads/planrun-release.apk
